channel.title: Deploy Flow :: Tuan Dat | Cloud & Backend Developer
channel.description: Table of Contents This section provides step-by-step guidance for deploying both Frontend and Backend components onto the cloud infrastructure. It covers the complete deployment workflow, from build artifacts preparation to production-ready release on AWS services. 5.3.1. Frontend Deploy Guidelines for building, configuring, and deploying the frontend to Amazon S3 + CloudFront with cross-region failover. 5.3.2. Backend Deploy Instructions for deploying backend microservices to AWS ECS/Fargate, including network configuration, load balancing, and service integration.

item.title: Frontend Deploy
item.description: Architectural model Domain: Route 53 (DNS) + ACM (SSL Certificate). CDN: CloudFront (Global Edge Network). Storage (Primary): S3 Singapore (ap-southeast-1). Storage (Failover): S3 N. Virginia (us-east-1). Replication: Automatically copy code from Singapore -> Virginia. Security: OAC (Origin Access Control) - Private Bucket. Table of Contents Prerequisites

item.title: Backend Deploy
item.description: Architecture Model This model illustrates the core services used for high-availability, low-latency content delivery and security: Domain & SSL: Route 53 (DNS) is used for domain management, and ACM (SSL Certificate) secures the traffic. CDN: CloudFront acts as the Global Edge Network for content delivery. Storage (Primary): S3 in Singapore (ap-southeast-1) holds the main static assets.

item.title: CI/CD
item.description: OVERVIEW WORKFLOW Security Configuration: Provide AWS credentials to GitHub. Project Structure: Create .yml workflow files. Workflow Content: Copy standard code for 6 services. Activation: Push code to GitHub to trigger the system. STEP 1: SECURITY CONFIGURATION (SECRETS) GitHub needs AWS access rights to deploy on your behalf.

item.title: Quy trình triển khai
item.description: Mục lục Phần này cung cấp hướng dẫn từng bước để triển khai cả Frontend và Backend lên hạ tầng điện toán đám mây. Nội dung bao quát toàn bộ quy trình triển khai, từ khâu chuẩn bị build artifacts cho đến khi ứng dụng được phát hành ở môi trường production trên các dịch vụ AWS.
